math: file-watch event ~1200 B. gb/day = events * 1200 / 1e9; $/month = gb/day * 30.4 * 5.00. read typical: 20000*1200/1e9 = 0.024 GB/day -> 0.024*30.4*5 = $3.65/mo. write typical: 2000*1200/1e9 = 0.0024 GB/day -> $0.36/mo. Total typical = $4.01/mo. Standardized from 900 to 1200 B/event (locked 2026-06-03).
breadth_note: The volume is driven by the permtab syscall-group expansion: -p r covers 21 read syscalls and -p w covers 26 write syscalls (permtab.h, f3 section 2.4). A 'one rule = one syscall' model would under-rank these watches' breadth, even though the dollar band is rate-driven.
